## Test checklist

- [ ] Deployed to local SillyTavern and opened the extension
- [ ] Feature/fix works on the golden path
- [ ] No regressions in adjacent features (table, ingest, export)
- [ ] No new console errors

## Commit conventions (for auto-versioning)

| Prefix | Effect |
|--------|--------|
| `feat:` | Minor bump (0.X.0) — new feature |
| `fix:` | Patch bump (0.0.X) — bug fix |
| `feat!:` / `BREAKING CHANGE:` | Major bump (X.0.0) |
| `chore:` `docs:` `style:` `refactor:` | No version bump |
